headline: RETRY confirms static FAIL DIAGNOSIS — reduce_sum PTX is statically malformed; ptxas rejects with 6 errors mapping 1:1 to the 5 codegen gaps + 1 syntax error from `%fd-1` negative-id leak. F-RFC071-NVPTX-E2E-PTXAS-CLEAN now flipped from BLOCKED to FAIL with concrete ptxas diagnostics. F-RFC071-E2E-REDUCE-SUM-SINGLE-THREAD-NUMERIC-EQ remains FAIL by upstream JIT rejection. Codegen fixes (5 gaps G1-G5) NOT addressed this cycle — task constraint: DO NOT touch compiler source.

retry_context.ptx_source: /tmp/rfc071_retry_2026_05_21/reduce_sum.sm_80.ptx (byte-identical copy of N59 broken PTX — no codegen fix landed yet, so re-emit would produce same bytes)
retry_context.ptxas_error_log:
ptxas application ptx input, line 24; error   : Arguments mismatch for instruction 'mov'
ptxas application ptx input, line 28; error   : Predicate expression expected
ptxas application ptx input, line 32; error   : Arguments mismatch for instruction 'mov'
ptxas application ptx input, line 33; error   : Arguments mismatch for instruction 'add'
ptxas application ptx input, line 35; error   : Arguments mismatch for instruction 'add'
ptxas application ptx input, line 40; fatal   : Parsing error near '-': syntax error
ptxas fatal   : Ptx assembly aborted due to errors
retry_context.fatal_error: line 40 — Parsing error near '-' (the `%fd-1` negative-id leak from gap G5)
retry_context.cost: $0 ubu-2 LAN. ~1 sec ssh + JIT-reject wall.

static_fail_to_dynamic_fail_promotion.before: Pre-retry, status_jit_load=NOT_EXECUTED_HOST_UNREACHABLE, status_launch=NOT_EXECUTED_HOST_UNREACHABLE, status_numeric=FAIL_BY_STATIC_MALFORMEDNESS — claims based on substring asserts only.
static_fail_to_dynamic_fail_promotion.after: Post-retry, ptxas REJECT confirmed live: 6 ptxas errors, fatal at line 40, no launch attempted. The static diagnosis is now empirically validated on real RTX 5070 + driver 580 ptxas, not just deduced from substring inspection.

ptxas_error_to_gap_mapping.G1_while_cond_predicate_bank_mismatch: ptxas line 28 'Predicate expression expected' — the `@%fd5 bra` uses %fd5 (declared `.reg .f64`) where ptxas expects `.reg .pred`
ptxas_error_to_gap_mapping.G2_missing_stmt_load_on_accumulator_inde: ptxas line 33 'Arguments mismatch for add' — accumulator add references a register that was never loaded from global memory
ptxas_error_to_gap_mapping.G3_missing_stmt_store_on_out_index: (not directly surfaced; would be caught at link or runtime — but ptxas didn't reach link due to G5 fatal)
ptxas_error_to_gap_mapping.G4_var_local_misclassified_f64_for_i64: ptxas line 24/32 'Arguments mismatch for mov' — the i64 var %fd? mov references mix int/fp register types
ptxas_error_to_gap_mapping.G5_negative_dst_sentinel_leak: ptxas line 40 'Parsing error near -' FATAL — `%fd-1` literal in operand list is unparseable PTX syntax (registers must be `%fd<N>` with N>=0)

codegen_gaps_unaddressed: 5 (G1-G5) — see ptxas_error_to_gap_mapping above. Codegen fixes are required to make F-RFC071-E2E-REDUCE-SUM-SINGLE-THREAD-NUMERIC-EQ PASS. The task constraint 'DO NOT touch compiler source' means this retry surfaces the dynamic failure but does not fix the codegen.

honest_scope_g3.what_this_retry_proves: The N59 static-FAIL diagnosis (5 codegen gaps from substring assertions) maps 1:1 to live ptxas errors on real RTX 5070. The classification is correct.
honest_scope_g3.what_this_retry_does_not_prove: No codegen fix was applied; reduce_sum remains unrunnable.
honest_scope_g3.cross_cycle_dependency: Even if div.rn.f64 codegen restoration (N57 wipe recovery) lands, reduce_sum requires 5 additional codegen changes (predicate-bank classifier, STMT_LOAD on index Locals, STMT_STORE on literal-index stores, i64 var-local classification, negative-dst-Local elimination). These are independent of the N57 wipe.
honest_scope_g3.no_substrate_difference: Same ubu-2 / RTX 5070 / sm_120a JIT used for N50/N56/N57/N63. No Blackwell-vs-Ampere caveat.

artifacts.ptx: reduce_sum.sm_80.ptx (broken, in this dir — UNCHANGED from N59)
artifacts.result_json: result.json (this file, updated 2026-05-21 retry with dynamic ptxas evidence)
